message:
fix(mux): graceful shutdown during active transfers

Fixed double Ctrl+C requirement when transfers are in progress. The detached
pushDownloadFiles thread was blocking shutdown by waiting for all goroutines
to complete, even when the server was shutting down.

The thread now checks session.is_active during the goroutine wait loop and
exits early when cancelAll() is called during deinit().

Change:
- main.zig:3831: Add session.is_active check in defer goroutine wait loop

Result: Single Ctrl+C now cleanly shuts down the server.
